name: Slatemark
description: A fortified mining settlement built into dark slate cliffs. Known for its resilient people and the deep veins of ore beneath.
notes: Major trade hub. Controlled by the Slate Guild.

name: Garden of the Ancients
description: An overgrown ruin filled with colossal stone statues and strange, luminescent flora. The air hums with residual magic.
notes: Ancient druidic site. Possible dungeon entrance in the northern grove.

name: Pewter-5
description: The fifth outpost in the Pewter line — a watchtower network spanning the southern ridge. Partially collapsed but still manned.
notes: Garrison of 12 soldiers. Signal fire system still operational.

name: Iron-4
description: A fortified checkpoint along the Iron Road. Heavily armored gates control passage through the narrow canyon.
notes: Toll station. 5gp per wagon, 1gp per traveler.

name: Argent
description: A shimmering lakeside town known for its silver-working artisans and the great library that overlooks the water.
notes: Library contains maps of the old kingdom. Sage NPC: Thelandra.

name: Silicon-3
description: A crystal-encrusted cavern complex used as a research station. Strange echoes and refracted light fill every chamber.
notes: Crystals can be harvested (Arcana DC 15). Worth 50gp each.

name: Gold-1
description: The primary gold mine of Echo Valley. Wealthy and well-guarded, it draws prospectors and trouble in equal measure.
notes: Mine boss: Durgan Ironfist. Rumor of a collapsed lower level.

name: Saltcroft
description: A coastal settlement where salt is harvested from vast tidal flats. The briny wind carries far across the valley.
notes: Salt trade route connects to Slatemark. Festival of Tides in autumn.

name: Technomancer's Library
description: A vast repository of magical and technological knowledge, where ancient tomes and modern inventions coexist.
notes: Home to the Archmage of Technology. Rare scrolls and artifacts available for study.

name: Colossus
description: A massive stone statue of a forgotten hero, standing sentinel over the valley. Its eyes seem to follow travelers.
notes: Ancient guardian. Possible hidden chamber at its base.
